summary: Tests are well-organized with clear structure and good basic functionality coverage, but have significant gaps in rigor. Missing explicit tests for feature_flags (mentioned in implementation but never tested), default values (max_parallel=256, fail_fast=true), empty/missing dimensions, boundary conditions (matrix at exactly max_size limit), and invalid input scenarios. Fixture files are external dependencies without verification they exist. Tests don't validate the exact JSON structure expected by GitHub Actions or verify include/exclude entries have correct structure. Good design and readability, but insufficient edge case coverage to catch regressions.
